text:
BOTTOM LINE — Tech-led grind higher, semis crushed, utilities lagged.
QQQ +2.34% topped amid AI momentum, SPY +0.83% followed on chip gains, while XLU -0.89% faded post-infrastructure hype. Positioning showed protection demand via elevated PCRs, but low-conviction breadth signaled distribution risks. Flows favored semis over broad indices, confirming large-cap dominance.

INDICES — VIX 17.2 down vs 18.1 20d MA. QQQ +2.34%, SPY +0.83%, IWM +0.68%, DIA +0.04%. Large > small by 1.66pp. SLV +1.97% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — QQQ vol_ratio 1.1x elevated on +2.34% price = accumulation; SPY absent from spikes amid +0.83% = low-conviction rally. XLK 1.1x gaining attention, XLE 0.7x ignored on downside. Industries ARKG 2.6x vol spike with +0.33% hints accumulation.

SECTORS — XLK Technology +3.44%, XLB Materials +0.37%, XLY Discretionary +0.27%, XLP Staples +0.24%, XLRE Real Estate +0.02%, XLC Comms -0.37%, XLE Energy -0.45%, XLI Industrials -0.46%, XLF Financials -0.60%, XLV Healthcare -0.85%, XLU Utilities -0.89%. Top industries SOXX +5.67%, SMH +4.90%; bottom IBUY -2.17%, MSOS -3.63%.

THE 7s — Semi 7 +6.68% (NVDA strongest, INTC weakest), Fab 7 +5.16% (AMD strongest, TSM weakest), Old Metals 7 +3.18% (FCX strongest, AA weakest), Mag 7 +0.94% (MSFT strongest, GOOG weakest), New Metals 7 +0.78%; Medtech 7 -2.62% (SYK strongest, MDT weakest), Cloud 7 -3.55% (NET strongest -23.62%, SNOW weakest), Buildout 7 -1.03%, Toll Road 7 -1.19%, Power 7 -1.32%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Hawk 6 (Cook, Hammack, Kashkari, Logan, Barkin, Goolsbee), neutral 5 (Powell, Williams, Barr, Jefferson, Paulson), dove 4 (Bowman, Miran, Waller, Daly). USD liquidity 26/100 normal, Reserve Scarcity 85th percentile most stressed; TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.15 elevated = protection; QQQ 1.48 higher fear. Positive skews SPY +3.4%, QQQ +7.3% = put premium. SPY above GEX_flip 736.

CROSS-ASSET — Silver +1.97% decoupled from gold +0.48% on industrial demand, ignoring dollar stability. Oil -1.02% pressured energy -0.45% amid Strait of Hormuz talks.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 53.1 neutral. Top movers NET -23.62% Cloud 7, SOXX +5.67% semis, SMH +4.90% semis. 20d momentum XLK +23.07% best sector, Semi 7 +50.48% best basket; XLU -4.77% worst sector, Medtech 7 -10.47% worst basket. NET vol 4.2x + price -23.62% = distribution on layoffs.

WATCH — NET -23.62%, vol 4.2x spike signals capitulation. SOXX +5.67%, momentum leader near gamma flip. XLU -0.89%, trend divergence vs utilities infrastructure news.
